fragility_points: A sharp macro or crypto-specific selloff could erase the current cushion quickly.
Binance-specific operational ambiguity near settlement could matter at the margin.
key_assumptions: BTC remains comfortably above 70000 into Apr 20 noon ET.
No major risk-off shock forces a roughly 5-6% drawdown before settlement.
Binance remains the operative and usable governing source.
main_logical_chain: Start from the market's 0.87 price as an information-rich prior.
Verify the governing source and confirm BTC is currently around 74000 on Binance.
Check one independent contextual source and confirm the broader market also sees BTC around 74000.
Apply a modest discount because the contract settles on one future minute close several days away.
main_thesis: The market is directionally right that BTC is likely to finish above 70000 on Apr 20, but the 0.87 price looks mildly rich relative to remaining five-day volatility into one exact Binance minute close.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title.
source_quality_view: High-quality direct governing-source check plus one medium-high-quality contextual verification; source-of-truth ambiguity is fairly low but not zero.
strongest_disconfirmers: Settlement depends on one future Binance 12:00 ET minute close, not today's spot.
BTC can move more than 5% over five days, so a sub-70000 close remains plausible.
strongest_supports: Binance BTCUSDT traded around 73994.6 during the run, well above 70000.
CoinGecko independently showed BTC around 74006 with the sampled 1-day range above 70000.
Contract mechanics are simple close-above, so a large current cushion naturally supports a high Yes price.
timing_relevance: High: the market resolves at an exact future minute on 2026-04-20 12:00 ET, so remaining path volatility matters.
unresolved_ambiguities: How stable the current 74000 regime remains through Apr 20 noon ET.
Whether any near-term catalyst or shock emerges before settlement.
what_would_change_view: A sustained Binance move back toward or below 70000, or new evidence of exchange-specific/resolution-surface issues, would push the estimate lower.
